description: CompositionGrey tunic made of lightweight, knitted 100% viscose, has a round neckline, flutter sleeves and black piping on the shoulders and sleevesFitRegularWash careRinse seperatelyGentle hand wash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery and printLine dry inside outIron lowIt’s time to explore and discover new styles and get ready for freshness and summer outdoors with sepia. Stylish, girly and summery, this tunic is a must-have in your new season wardrobe. Pair this with form fitting jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
